channel.title: FTD2026 Events on Fur Trade Days
channel.description: Recent content in FTD2026 Events on Fur Trade Days
channel.copyright: © 2026 Fur Trade Days, Inc. • Produced in part by a grant from the Dawes County Travel Board.

item.title: Big. Stage. Fundraiser.
item.description: Fur Trade Days is a party. A time to gather with family, friends, former classmates and celebrate the Chadron community’s past, present, and future. In the last handful of years, awesome live music has been a cornerstone of that party and it’s high time for an upgrade!

item.title: Carnival
item.description: We are excited to partner with Mac’s to bring you another outstanding Fur Trade Days Carnival in 2026! With 12 great rides, concessions, and the midway, Mac’s Carnival has something fun for kids of all ages.

item.title: Live Music
item.description: Fur Trade Days is excited to bring you great entertainment downtown.

item.title: Traders Market
item.description: From food to finds, antiques and oddities, the Fur Trade Days Traders’ Market features food vendors and craft merchants from around the region and across the country; providing something of interest for just about everyone.

item.title: Lions Club Parade
item.description: The 50th Annual Lions Club Fur Trade Days Parade starts at 10 a.m. on Saturday, July 11 and proceeds down Main Street from Tenth to First streets. Candy and other goodies will be passed out along the parade route. Come early to claim a good seat and enjoy the excitement!

item.title: Buckskinners Camp
item.description: The Bordeaux Creek Fur Trade and Muzzleloading Association’s Rendezvous, located 3.5 miles east and 8 miles south of Chadron, is expected to open Thursday, July 9 for camp setup.

item.title: Activities and More
item.description: Family-friendly fun begins Friday at the Dawes County Court House Gazebo.
